name: desktop-commander
description: Desktop Commander MCP integration for local filesystem, process, and terminal workflows in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Local filesystem and terminal superpowers via MCP
interface.longDescription: Use Desktop Commander MCP in Codex to read and edit local files, run terminal commands, manage processes, and perform structured local analysis workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use /desktop-commander:desktop-commander-ops to inspect and edit local project files safely
Read a file with desktop-commander and summarize the important sections
Use desktop-commander process tools to analyze a local CSV with Python REPL
